steps.title: Convert 25% to a simplified fraction
steps.content: Express 25% as a fraction: $$25\% = \frac{25}{100}$$. Simplify by dividing numerator and denominator by 25: $$\frac{25}{100} = \frac{1}{4}$$

steps.title: Calculate the number of blue beads
steps.content: Find 1/4 of 360 by dividing: $$360 \div 4 = 90$$. There are 90 blue beads in the box.
